title: Pan-Fried Bellflower Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with sweet bellflower, perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Activate yeast by mixing with 1/2 cup warm water and 1 tsp sugar. Let sit for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine xeridic, sugar, and yeast mixture. Mix well.
Add glazed, mediterranean herbs, and root. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
Chop bellflower into small pieces and fold into the batter.
Heat a non-stick pan with 1/2 inch of oil over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the oil and flatten slightly.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
